description_long: This is a modern, minimalist wooden shelving unit or cabinet, constructed from light-colored plywood with a natural wood grain finish. The structure features a rectangular top surface and two open vertical sides, with an asymmetrical internal shelf system that creates multiple storage compartments of varying heights. The left side of the unit has a tall, narrow open space, while the right side is divided by a partial vertical panel, forming a smaller cubby. The back and sides are fully enclosed, giving the piece a clean, geometric appearance. The overall design is functional and visually striking, suitable for use as a display shelf, side table, or storage unit in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public seating areas.
description: A light wood, minimalist shelving unit with open sides and asymmetrical internal compartments, featuring a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelving structure with a tall left compartment and a smaller right cubby divided by a vertical panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a fully enclosed, flat wooden panel with visible wood grain and no openings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, revealing the open compartments and the internal shelf structure from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a solid, flat wooden panel with no visible openings.
